turn_notes:
Park is in a late-phase, expansion-heavy state with 14 rides, 4 shops, 2 janitors, 1 mechanic, and 1 specialty shop; major assets are generally operating, including a repaired yellow coaster and a roller coaster that briefly went out of service before returning. The park value has climbed to about $80,203 with cash around $34,915, but the rating has been volatile and recently sits near 35.36 after sharp swings from the low 20s to 40s. Cleanliness is now the main operational concern, with cleanliness slipping to about 0.52 and uptime around 0.89; a janitor was already hired to stabilize this. Free tiles are exhausted, so no more expansion space remains. Food/drink inventory issues were earlier resolved, though shops can still run low. Current priority is preserving cash and value, monitoring cleanliness and ride uptime, and avoiding unnecessary spending while letting staff keep the park stable.
